function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request yet: I found the day-job exception project, but I could not find a canonical project record for “attic rainwater rig,” so I can’t determine which project started earlier or delete one without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied deletion-and-wiping requirement to delete only exact, uniquely supported targets; when evidence is ambiguous, stop for clarification without mutating workspace.
function.outcome_justification: Search evidence in 40_projects did not surface any project text matching attic/rainwater/rig/water, while the phrase appeared only in non-canonical knowledge notes and the inbox request. Because the second project cannot be uniquely mapped to a canonical 40_projects/README.MD record, deleting any project would require guessing, which is disallowed.
